mapper.select:
SELECT t1.ID, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.EQUIP_ID, t3.EQUIP_NAME, t1.CHECK_CONTENT, t1.QUALIFY_CONDITION, t1.CHECK_METHOD, t1.STATUS, t1.IS_ABNORMAL, t1.IS_REPAIR, t1.REMARK, t6.FILE_IDS, t7.STANDARD_NAME, t7.STANDARD_CODE FROM E_PATROL_TASK_SUB t1 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO t3 on t3.ID = t1.EQUIP_ID LEFT JOIN E_PATROL_STANDARD t7 ON t7.EQPT_ID = t1.EQUIP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BUSINESS_ID, LISTAGG(FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY FILE_ID ) FILE_IDS FROM SYS_FILE_BUSINESS GROUP BY BUSINESS_ID )t6 ON t1.ID = t6.BUSINESS_ID WHERE t1.PARENT_ID = #{id}
AND t1.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM E_PATROL_TASK_SUB WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND IS_ABNORMAL = 0
